nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: Yellow-bellied chat-tyrant
nodes.summary: Yellow-bellied chat-tyrant（Yellow-bellied chat-tyrant，学名 Silvicultrix diadema），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于云雾森林，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 云雾森林
nodes.summary: 云雾森林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联206种鸟类，包括Black guan、Red-faced guan、紫冠雉等206种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | page =462 |isbn = 978-0-691-13023-1 }} The yellow-bellied chat-tyrant primarily inhabits the interior and undergrowth of humid montane forest and cloudforest in the subtropical and temperate zones

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: III | title =Birds of Peru | publisher =Princeton University Press | edition =revised and updated |series=Princeton Field Guides | date =2010 | location =Princeton, NJ | page =462 |isbn = 978-0-691-13023-1 }} The yellow-bellied chat-tyrant primarily inhabits the interior and undergrowth of humid montane forest and cloudforest in the subtropical and temperate zones
